units.content: US Patent 12,299,022 B2 / 2024/0354322 A1 granted to Palantir Technologies Inc., priority April 2023, granted 2025, titled 'Ontology extension via LLM-driven pipeline'
System operates on data through an ontology layer assigning semantic types (object types, property types) and uses LLM extraction to populate it
Claim 1 and claim 13 tightened disclaimer item (ii): no separate object-type or property-type registry external to the storage
The external-registry disclaimer in claims 1 and 13 forecloses a reading that would cover the invention's architecture
